chart.prompt: Anzahl Versandbelege pro Tag in den letzten 14 Tagen
chart.sql_string:
SELECT
    TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', s.sent_at::timestamp), 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS "Tag",
    COUNT(DISTINCT s.shipment_id) AS "Anzahl Versandbelege"
FROM shipments s
WHERE s.sent_at::date >= DATEADD(day, -14, CURRENT_DATE)
  AND s.sent_at::date < CURRENT_DATE + 1
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

en.title: Shipments per day
en.description: Outgoing shipments per day over the last fourteen days — warehouse throughput at a glance.

de.title: Versandbelege pro Tag
de.description: Ausgehende Versandbelege pro Tag der letzten 14 Tage — Lager-Durchsatz auf einen Blick.
